summary: Completed iteration 17 testing - All requested changes verified: Finance role removed, Not Started status removed from Dashboard Team Tasks Overview, Team invitation workflow working, Database cleared, and first user gets admin role.
seed_data_creation: Created test project and tasks with 6 different statuses to verify Team Tasks filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database was completely cleared and recreated with admin test user. All iteration 17 features verified working.

roles_only_four.notes: Roles endpoint returns exactly 4 roles: admin, manager, team_lead, team_member. NO finance role, NO supervisor role.

verification: Backend ROLES config has only 4 roles
Team Page Role Permissions Overview shows only 4 roles
Team Invitation dialog dropdown shows only 4 roles
Backend ROLES config does not include supervisor

dashboard_team_tasks_no_not_started.notes: Team Tasks Overview section shows only 4 columns: Assigned, In Progress, On Hold, Under Review. NO 'Not Started' column. Backend correctly excludes 'not_started' and 'completed' tasks.

database_cleared.notes: All collections cleared: users, sessions, projects, proposals, tasks, time_logs, clients, leaves, reimbursements, team_invitations, email_notifications

first_user_admin_role.verification: Backend code at line 487-499 checks user_count and assigns 'admin' role to first user when count is 0

features_verified: Duplicate invitation for same email rejected

invite_team_member_button.notes: Button correctly shows for Admin user with data-testid='invite-team-btn'

admin_manager_can_invite.notes: Admin has can_invite_team=true, Manager has can_invite_team=true. Team Lead and Team Member have can_invite_team=false.

mocked_api_notes: Gmail/Email notifications are in DEMO MODE - invitations stored in database but not actually sent. Dialog shows note about demo mode.
